hooks.command: docker compose -f /Users/son/Desktop/dev/rafiki/docker-compose.local.yml run --rm django pre-commit run --all-files 1>&2 || printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"pre-commit failed — fix the lint errors above and retry the commit"}'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && uvx ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" && uvx ruff format --quiet "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.html ]] && uvx djlint "$f" --reformat --quiet; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '(models|views|serializers|urls|api).*\.py$' || exit 0; docker compose -f /Users/son/Desktop/dev/rafiki/docker-compose.local.yml exec -T django python manage.py spectacular --validate >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo "[doc-check] OpenAPI schema invalid — run 'manage.py spectacular --validate' for details" 1>&2; } 2>/dev/null || true
